name: open-krode
description: OpenCode plugin for kro RGD visualization and live instance observability

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.install:plugin: bun run build && cp dist/index.js package.json ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/open-krode/

author: rrroizma
